entries.subject: Atacicept in IgA Nephropathy (IgAN)
entries.regeneration_reason: No prior thesis on record for VERA; source candidate file updated and catalyst within 60 business days.
entries.web_research_verdict: Street narrative remains anchored to the sibeprenlimab $292,500 WAC and IgAN TAM expansion. Atacicept ORIGIN 3 Phase III data (39% UPCR reduction, 46% hematuria resolution) is BTD-supported and label-competitive. Risk skew is label breadth/positioning vs head-to-head efficacy, not approval probability. No litigation, no competing AdCom drama, analyst dispersion is narrowing bullish. Web layer validates the thesis.

entries.subject: Veligrotug (IV anti-IGF-1R) in Thyroid Eye Disease (TED)

recommendation.stance: Hold / Modest Buy at watchlist size

entries.regeneration_reason: No prior thesis on record; score recently demoted to watchlist following REVEAL-1 disappointment and Amgen SC Tepezza 76.7% PRR readout — fresh framing required.
entries.web_research_verdict: Market is conflating long-dated elegrobart franchise damage (Amgen SC Tepezza superiority) with near-dated veligrotug IV approval probability. THRIVE / THRIVE-2 data is clean enough to support approval (~85–90% probability) and the IV niche persists even in an SC-dominant long-term landscape. Analyst price target cuts are franchise-oriented, not approval-oriented. Elevated short interest and depressed sentiment create a modest positive approval-day skew, but wider long-tail distribution argues for hedged expression and watchlist sizing.

entries.subject: American Industrial Partners take-private at $25.00 per share cash
entries.regeneration_reason: No prior thesis on record for AVNS; candidate file created 2026-04-14 on definitive merger agreement announcement.
entries.web_research_verdict: Strengthens thesis on deal completion probability (~95-97%). No topping bid/antitrust concerns identified; confirms 72.1% premium as top-decile and consistent with negotiated process. Spread is fairly priced; arb edge is financing-dependent, not fundamental.
entries.word_count_note: Exceeded 4500-word target (4989); content is dense and structurally-required for merger-arb-specific risk decomposition.

entries.subject: Forager Fund activist campaign — 12.5% poison-pill trigger vs. 12.9% stake (Veradace Partners 8.4% second axis)
entries.hash_change_reason: Monitoring-log-only changes detected in source candidate file; no substantive thesis regression.

catalyst.type: Activist campaign (poison-pill adopted; Forager 13D/A #2 same day)

entries.regeneration_reason: v1 thesis written 2026-04-15 morning omitted Veradace Partners 8.4% stake and 2026-04-09 public letter opposing KUBRA (validated via WebSearch against primary sources: Business Wire, Stocktitan, Payments Dive, SEC Form ADV). Material gap: per Phase 2 rule (d), the web-research layer surfaced a new material finding (second activist-adjacent shareholder; hardening board response) not captured in the candidate .md file or v1 thesis. Archived v1 to reporting_layer/archive/2026-04-15_RPAY_superseded_v1/ and patched v1 docx in place with Veradace content across Summary, Case-in-Six-Points, Key Numbers, A.4 Governance, A.7 Market Interpretation, Kill condition 7, Catalyst Calendar, Sources, Recommendation and Verdict boxes.
entries.web_research_verdict: STRENGTHENS v1 further. Veradace Partners (8.4%, founded 2019 by ex-NWQ co-president John Conlin + Alex Vezendan, Dallas-based) issued 2026-04-09 public letter to independent directors calling for KUBRA termination and 2 board seats, claiming "every single actively-managed investor" polled opposed the deal. Repay board response 2026-04-09 reiterated KUBRA commitment (hardening signal, closes quiet-settlement path). Combined Forager 12.9% + Veradace 8.4% = ~21.3% of Class A float visibly opposed to current capital-allocation trajectory. Stock -17% on KUBRA announcement 2026-03-30; RPAY underperformed S&P and Russell 2000 by 20% since. ATG Fund Delaware Chancery lawsuit is against Empery Digital (EMPD), NOT RPAY — original search result was conflated; no RPAY litigation found. Thesis intact and modestly strengthened via two-axis shareholder pressure; kill condition 7 (Veradace private settlement without Forager) added.
entries.word_count_note: 5735 words — extension of v1's 5243-word baseline (+492 for Veradace layer). Still outside 2500–4500 target, but consistent with AVNS (4989) / GSAT (5676) precedent for complex multi-axis situations.
